endpoint.description: Absolute HTTP(S) S3-compatible API endpoint URL; path prefixes are allowed.

bucket.description: Bucket where rendered plans are uploaded.

region.description: S3 signing region; R2 commonly uses auto.

access_key_id.description: Access key ID for explicit credentials; must be paired with secret_access_key.

secret_access_key.description: Secret for explicit credentials; must be paired with access_key_id.

public_base_url.description: Absolute HTTP(S) public base URL used to assemble share links; path prefixes are allowed.

key_prefix.description: UTF-8 path segments prepended to uploaded keys; empty, dot, and dot-dot segments are rejected.

template.description: Path to the HTML template used for rendered pages.

collection_template.description: Path to the HTML template used for collection overview pages.

no_source.description: Omit uploading the original source alongside rendered output.

indexable.description: Allow search indexing by omitting the noindex robots meta tag.

no_external_assets.description: Disable airplan-managed features that load external assets when a page is viewed.

mermaid_url.description: Absolute HTTPS URL of the Mermaid ECMAScript module.

repo.description: Repository context: auto, none, or an explicit GitHub-compatible repository URL.

timeout.description: Operation timeout as a Go duration or seconds; 0 disables it.

bucket.description: Bucket where rendered plans are uploaded.

region.description: S3 signing region; R2 commonly uses auto.

access_key_id.description: Access key ID for explicit credentials; must be paired with secret_access_key.

secret_access_key.description: Secret for explicit credentials; must be paired with access_key_id.

repo.description: Repository context: auto, none, or an explicit GitHub-compatible repository URL.

timeout.description: Operation timeout as a Go duration or seconds; 0 disables it.

default_profile.description: Profile selected when no explicit profile is set.

profiles.description: Named profiles that inherit and override root-level settings.
